goal: Prove real-adapter campaign delivery end-to-end: two milestones create and extend notes/hello.md with exact sentinel lines (sign -> run -> advisory pause -> ship decision -> resume -> done).

milestones.objective: Create notes/hello.md containing exactly the line HELLO-CANARY-M1.
milestones.acceptance_bar: notes/hello.md exists and contains the exact line HELLO-CANARY-M1 (nothing about M2 yet).

milestones.objective: Append exactly the line HELLO-CANARY-M2 to notes/hello.md, preserving the M1 line unchanged.
milestones.acceptance_bar: notes/hello.md contains BOTH exact lines HELLO-CANARY-M1 and HELLO-CANARY-M2, M1 first.
